# Project Management Plan (PMP)

## Scope Management
Scope controlled via formal Change Requests approved by Sponsor.

## Schedule Management
Milestone-based planning with SME buffers.

## Cost Management
Personnel, compute, and contingency tracked monthly.

## Quality Management
Precision-first metrics validated by SMEs.

## Resource Management
Defined RACI under SUB governance.

## Communication Management
Weekly status, milestone reviews.

## Risk Management
Continuous monitoring of environmental and data risks.

## Change Management
Formal Change Control Log maintained.
